title: mentha longifolia var. stenostachya
intro: Mentha longifolia var. stenostachya, also known as Egyptian mint, is a variety of the long-leaved mint plant, characterized by its narrow, pointed leaves and a more compact growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Egyptian mint include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and fever, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve respiratory health. Egyptian mint can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
